title: Cell — one layer at one scope with a maturity state (the unit of the lattice)
description: Identity is {layer}.{scope}.{slug}; maturity is a Property, never part of the identity. See references/agentic-systems-foundations/agentic-systems-ontology.md.

x-settledMaturities.description: The maturities that count as a validated foothold: they require non-empty `signal_refs` (the signal-currency contract) and receive the phantom-signal + retroactive-partial-order checks. The single source for lattice.py check()'s SETTLED set (a custom annotation keyword, ignored by JSON-Schema validators; the module constant is the portable fallback for the wired copy).

layer.description: The modality axis — the kind of declarative knowledge this cell carries.

scope.description: The grain axis — the size of the unit of work this cell governs.

maturity.description: Exactly one state from the maturity machine. `blocked` is a condition flag, not a maturity state.

blocked.description: Condition flag — the advancement loop hit a budget cap or a no-progress signature. A blocked cell falls out of rank/advance-validity until unblocked. Surfaces the cell to the compass instead of burning tokens.

blocked_reason.description: Why the cell was blocked (budget cap or no-progress signature), set alongside `blocked` by the orchestrator/stop-gate; cleared on unblock.

asset_ref.description: Repo-relative path to the artifact that instantiates this cell (the layer-dir file).

signal_refs.description: Paths to the validation signal artifacts under signals/{cell-id}/. The only currency accepted at scope boundaries.

validated_against.description: Map of upstream cell-id -> content hash this cell was validated against. When an upstream hash changes, this cell flips to `stale` (propagate-staleness).

depends_on.description: Upstream cell-ids this cell requires (the dependency partial-order edges). Readiness is gated on these being `validated`.

verifier.description: The rubric cell-id this cell's loop binds to. A cell advances only against a `validated` rubric (the verifier-maturity precondition).

budget.description: Loop budget primitives (policy instances). Exhaustion flips `blocked`.

attempts.description: Count of engine passes run on this cell (read from the ledger).
